pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 98 - document created via python-docx at this location
task.json description and export_result.sh line 12 - expected output path for formatted document

setup_task.sh line 63 - appears in synthetic document content. Web search found Meridian Therapeutics (Myelovax vaccine for myeloma) and acupuncture clinics, but no pharmaceutical company by this name in Cambridge, MA with CDK4/6 inhibitor programs.

setup_task.sh line 42 - appears in synthetic document as 'IND Application Number 123456'. Web search for IND 123456 found no real FDA application - this is a fictional IND number used for the task scenario.

setup_task.sh line 49 and 55 - appears in synthetic document as compound name with description 'A Selective CDK4/6 Inhibitor for the Treatment of NSCLC with KRAS G12C Mutation'. Web searches for MRD-4721 found no pharmaceutical literature, clinical trial results, or drug database entries. This is a fictional compound used for the task scenario.
task.json description line 4 and verifier.py line 131 - exact text to be placed in first page footer

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task with a programmatically-generated LibreOffice Writer document. The task requires configuring alternating headers and footers for a fictional IND Annual Report document (source: /home/ga/Documents/ind_annual_report.docx, output: /home/ga/Documents/ind_annual_report_formatted.docx). The document is generated during task setup with content for a fictional pharmaceutical company (Meridian Therapeutics, Inc., Cambridge, MA 02142) and a fictional drug compound (MRD-4721, described as a CDK4/6 inhibitor for NSCLC). All metadata values match the content of the synthetic document. The task verification checks for proper header/footer configuration including the first-page footer text 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Therapeutics, Inc.'
